name: Bourbon Street Steak
recipeInstructions:
1. First, get out all your aggressions on the meat.
2. Pack the steaks with about 1/4 inch thick layer of brown sugar on both sides.
3. Place the steaks in a deep dish and chop the garlic finely.
4. Sprinkle the chopped garlic evenly over the steaks.
5. Add salt and pepper to taste.
6. Pour bourbon over the steaks until they are completely submerged.
7. Let the steaks marinate for at least 3-4 hours, or overnight in the refrigerator.
8. When ready to cook, barbecue the steaks with hickory chips added to the charcoal, or broil them in the oven.
9. Enjoy!
